zh.lifeSummary: 當John Cochrane於1490年出生在英國時，他的父親Robert Cochran Of That Ilk11487歲，母親Elizabeth Sempill31歲。他於1520年與Margaret Douglas在蘇格蘭雷福福爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1539年5月22日享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Cochrane于1490年出生在英国时，他的父亲Robert Cochran Of That Ilk11487岁，母亲Elizabeth Sempill31岁。他于1520年与Margaret Douglas在苏格兰雷福福爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1539年5月22日享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cochrane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Cochran
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire and Renfrewshire): habitational name from the lands of Cochrane in the parish of Paisley, near Glasgow. The placename is of uncertain derivation, perhaps from Welsh coch ‘red’, although this etymology is not supported by the early spelling Coueran.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Cochrane was born in 1490, in England, his father, Robert Cochran Of That Ilk, was 11487 and his mother, Elizabeth Sempill, was 31. He married Margaret Douglas in 1520, in Renfrewshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 22 May 1539, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Cochrane est né en 1490, à Angleterre, son père, Robert Cochran Of That Ilk, avait 11487 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Sempill, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Douglas en 1520, à Renfrewshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 22 mai 1539, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Cochrane 1490 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Cochran Of That Ilk 11487 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Sempill 31. Er hat 1520 in Renfrewshire, Scotland Margaret Douglas geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 22. Mai 1539 im Alter von 49 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Cochrane è nato il nel 1490 nel England, il suo padre, Robert Cochran Of That Ilk, aveva 11487 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Sempill, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Douglas nel 1520, nel Renfrewshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 22 maggio 1539, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Cochraneが1490年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Robert Cochran Of That Ilkは11487歳，母Elizabeth Sempillは31歳であった。1520年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアでMargaret Douglasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1539年5月22日に49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Cochrane(이)가 1490년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Cochran Of That Ilk(은)는 11487세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Sempill(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1520년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르에서 Margaret Douglas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1539년 5월 22일 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Cochrane nasceu em 1490, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Cochran Of That Ilk, tinha 11487 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Sempill, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Douglas em 1520, em Renfrewshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 22 de maio de 1539, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Cochrane родился в 1490 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Cochran Of That Ilk было 11487 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Sempill, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Douglas в 1520 г. в местности ренфрюшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 22 мая 1539 г. в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Cochrane nació en 1490, en Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Cochran Of That Ilk, tenía 11487 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Sempill, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Margaret Douglas en 1520, en Renfrewshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 22 de mayo de 1539, a la edad de 49 años.
